scope: Gated §16 pilot — mechanism validation on real tau2 with a real model (Gemma4). NOT an empirical experiment; n=2 tasks, rewards are not a result.
benchmark: tau2-clean worktree (frozen); airline domain dev tasks 7, 32
fullsync_reward_parity_to_baseline: N/A — the multi-agent team is a different agent than the single-agent baseline, so §10.9 is verified as FullSync evidence-projection payload-identity (unit-level), not reward-identity to baseline.
honest_caveats: Rewards are 0.0/MAX_STEPS across all 4 runs: the multi-agent flow does not complete these airline tasks within a 15-step budget. This is a mechanism smoke, not a performance or visibility-causality result.
n=2 tasks, 1 model, no repetitions beyond 1 — far below any inferential threshold. No RQ1 claim is made.
A full experiment (more tasks, reps, models, step budgets, baseline comparison) is future work, not part of this architecture task.
